interpretation.main_read: Iteration 7 consolidates the AP3-AP8 native-naturalization review: 12 rows are NAT4 Phase-8-ready policy or telemetry candidates, 3 rows remain NAT3 native-contract candidates, 4 rows remain implementation-gap blockers, and 5 rows are unsafe relabel rejections. This is a readiness classification matrix, not native implementation.
interpretation.scope_boundary: The matrix preserves row-level claim ceilings from I3-I6. NAT3 rows do not become Phase-8-ready, NAT2 blockers remain blockers, NAT0 unsafe relabels remain rejected, and all claim flags remain false.

purpose: Synthesize N19 Iterations 3-6 into one candidate classification matrix without widening any NAT level, claim boundary, or Phase 8 status.
